name: runtime-query
title: Runtime / Query
description: Query runtime game state in Play Mode. Find MonoBehaviours by type name and read their public fields and properties. Useful for verifying game logic, checking object states, reading scores, debugging component values, etc. Works with any MonoBehaviour in the scene — no project-specific setup required.

parameters.name: typeName
parameters.description: Full or partial type name of the MonoBehaviour to find (e.g. 'PlayerController', 'GameManager', 'MyNamespace.EnemyAI').

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specific field or property names to read (comma-separated). If empty, reads all public instance fields and properties.

parameters.name: findAll
parameters.description: If true, find all instances. If false, find first instance only.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of instances to return when findAll=true (default: 10).
